narrowIdea: The live workflow in four concrete steps.

steps.label: Step 1
steps.title: Pick the task
steps.subtitle: One CLI, one clear outcome
steps.description: Start from a narrow real task. No broad platform talk — just one thing we can finish live.

steps.label: Step 2
steps.title: Write the spec
steps.subtitle: Rules, constraints, acceptance
steps.description: We tell the model exactly what good looks like. Clear spec first, code second.

steps.label: Step 3
steps.title: Build fast
steps.subtitle: Prompt, inspect, patch
steps.description: Generate a slice, inspect the result, then tighten the next prompt instead of rewriting everything.

steps.label: Step 4
steps.title: Verify and ship
steps.subtitle: Test, demo, publish
steps.description: Run the checks, show the result, and only then move to the next feature or publish the build.

notes: This is the inserted step-system slide the deck was missing. Walk it once, then continue into the recap slide.
